steps.title: Translate the percents
steps.content:
Let the masses of the objects be $A$, $B$, and $C$. The statements become
$$
A=4.41B
$$
and
$$
A=0.00630C
$$

steps.title: Find the mass ratio
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for $A$ equal and solve for 
$$
\frac{C}{B}
$$
$$
4.41B=0.00630C
$$
$$
\frac{C}{B}=\frac{4.41}{0.00630}=700
$$

steps.title: Convert the ratio to percent
steps.content: Since $C$ is $p\%$ of $B$, write the ratio as $$ \frac{p}{100} $$ $$ \frac{p}{100}=700 $$ $$ p=700\cdot 100=70000 $$ The answer is 70000.
